case_title: ANDA SERBAN ET AL VS. THE FILLMORE CENTER

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JANAE DEL CASTILLO, RESIDENT SERVICES MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT THE FILLMORE CENTER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,345.00 FILED BY SERBAN, ANDA JOHNSON, WILLIAM MARSHALL AS TO DEFENDANT THE FILLMORE CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SERBAN, ANDA JOHNSON, WILLIAM MARSHALL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE FILLMORE CENTER $750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $750.00, THE BEFORE AMOUNT IS TOTAL APPLIED TO PLAINTIFFS LEDGER AS A CREDIT RELATED PARKING FEES REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$20.00) SERVED OCT-21-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE FILLMORE CENTER
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) STEPHANI YURKANIN, GENERAL MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT THE FILLMORE CENTER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2023 BY JUDGE MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF ANDA SERBAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM MARSHALL JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE FILLMORE CENTER IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY STEPHANI YURKANIN, GENERAL MANAGER AND JANAE DEL CASTILLO, RESIDENT SERVICE MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
